tasks.label: T1: Arm & Simulator
tasks.command: colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select adl_tasks && source install/setup.bash && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch kinova_gen3_7dof_robotiq_2f_85_moveit_config robot.launch.py robot_ip:=192.168.0.1 use_fake_hardware:=true

tasks.label: T2: Static Scene
tasks.command: colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select adl_tasks && source install/setup.bash && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 run adl_tasks scene_static

tasks.label: T3: Vision Node
tasks.command: colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select adl_tasks && source install/setup.bash && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 run adl_tasks vision_stub

tasks.label: T4: Vision Converter
tasks.command: colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select adl_tasks && source install/setup.bash && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 run adl_tasks scene_from_vision

tasks.label: T5: Clear Table Task
tasks.command: colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select adl_tasks && source install/setup.bash && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 run adl_tasks clear_table

tasks.label: T6: Call Task Command
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/workspace/ros2_kortex_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 topic pub --once /adl_command std_msgs/msg/String "{data: 'clear_table'}"
